title: Japanese-Style Nabemono Sea Bass
description: A light and flavorful Japanese-inspired dish made with tender sea bass, simmered in a savory broth. Serve with your favorite accompaniments for a delicious and memorable meal.
instructions: Combine broth mix and miso paste in a small saucepan. Whisk until smooth and bring to a simmer.
Add yuzu juice and ginger to the saucepan. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Season the sea bass fillets with salt. Add to the saucepan and poach for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
Strain the broth and discard the solids.
Serve the sea bass with the warm broth spooned over the top. Garnish with green onions and a drizzle of sesame oil.
